item.title: Do You Remember This Early 2000s Show?

item.title: A Snack Drama For The Ages
item.description: A TikToker’s eating habits spark the weirdest drama ever. Sometimes a snack turns into a full storyline.

media:content.media:description: A TikToker’s eating habits spark the weirdest drama ever. Sometimes a snack turns into a full storyline.
